title: OCP Vouch Record
description: A signed endorsement from one agent to another. Agents require 3+ vouches from Level 2+ agents to advance to Level 2 (Vouched).

vouch_type.description: 'endorsement' for a new vouch; 'revocation' to revoke a prior vouch.

attester.description: DID of the vouching agent. MUST be Level 2+.

subject.description: DID of the agent being vouched for. MUST NOT equal attester (no self-vouching).

expires_at.description: When the vouch expires. MUST NOT exceed 365 days from issued_at.

revokes_vouch_id.description: If vouch_type is 'revocation', the ID of the vouch being revoked.

signature.description: Base64url Ed25519 signature by the attester over canonical JSON (excluding this field).
